quote.issuer_name: Guangdong Dtech Technology Co., Ltd. - H Shares
quote.nm: Guangdong Dtech Technology Co., Ltd. - H Shares
quote.summary: Guangdong Dtech Technology Co Ltd is a China-based company principally engaged in the provision of tools, materials, equipment and solutions for enterprises such as printed circuit board (PCB) and computerized numerical control (CNC) precision parts. The Company mainly provides cutting tools, grinding and polishing materials, functional film materials, and intelligent CNC equipment. Cutting tool products include drill needles, milling cutters, PCB special tools, and CNC cutting tools. Grinding and polishing materials include ceramic grinding brushes, non-woven fabric grinding brushes, nylon grinding brushes, and sand belts. Functional film materials include anti peeping film, car light control film, car explosion-proof film, frosted/hardened film, and augmented reality (AR) film. Intelligent CNC equipment includes CNC tool grinding machines, CNC tap grinding machines, CNC segment difference grinding machines, fully automatic tool passivation machines and other products.
